2606.20255.title: The Register Gap: A Meaning Intelligence Framework for Nigerian Public Discourse
2606.20255.paper_summary: We introduce the Meaning Intelligence Framework (MIF), a nine-dimension annotation and evaluation schema for Nigerian public discourse that separates surface sentiment from true communicative intent. Existing benchmarks for Nigerian languages, including NaijaSenti and AfriSenti, treat sentiment classification as a three-way polarity task (positive, negative, neutral). We argue that the dominant failure mode of AI systems on Nigerian discourse is not translation failure but context failure: the same utterance carries opposite pragmatic force depending on speaker, audience, and situation. The MIF operationalises this insight across nine scored dimensions: register, surface sentiment, true intent, irony, coded subtext, risk tier, annotator confidence, speaker emotion, and recommended communications action. We construct a 30-item calibration dataset spanning Standard English, Nigerian English, Nigerian Pidgin, and code-mixed registers, and evaluate a frontier language model (Gemini 2.5 Flash) under zero-shot and schema-informed prompting conditions. The headline finding is the Register Gap: zero-shot register classification accuracy is 33.3%, rising to 73.3% (+40 points) when the model receives the MIF schema in-context. The composite Meaning Intelligence Score increases by 5.4 points (73.2 to 78.6) under schema-informed prompting, with the largest practical gains in register identification, coded-subtext detection (+10 points), and strategic action recommendation (+10.3 points). We release the framework specification, annotation guidelines, and the 30-item public calibration set to support reproducibility, while retaining a private holdout corpus for contamination-protected evaluation.
2606.20255.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了意義智能框架（MIF），這是一個九維的註釋和評估架構，用於尼日利亞公共話語，將表面情感與真實的交流意圖分開。現有的尼日利亞語言基準，包括NaijaSenti和AfriSenti，將情感分類視為三向極性任務（正面、負面、中立）。我們認為，AI系統在尼日利亞話語中的主要失效模式不是翻譯失敗，而是上下文失敗：同一句話根據說話者、聽眾和情境的不同，承載著相反的語用力量。MIF在九個計分維度上將這一見解具體化：註冊、表面情感、真實意圖、諷刺、編碼潛台詞、風險層級、註釋者信心、說話者情感和建議的交流行動。我們構建了一個包含30項的標定數據集，涵蓋標準英語、尼日利亞英語、尼日利亞皮欽語和混合語言註冊，並在零樣本和基於架構的提示條件下評估了一個前沿語言模型（Gemini 2.5 Flash）。主要發現是註冊差距：零樣本註冊分類的準確率為33.3%，當模型在上下文中接收MIF架構時，準確率上升至73.3%（+40個點）。在基於架構的提示下，綜合意義智能分數增加了5.4分（從73.2到78.6），在註冊識別、編碼潛台詞檢測（+10分）和戰略行動建議（+10.3分）方面取得了最大的實際增益。我們發布了框架規範、註釋指南和30項公共標定集，以支持可重複性，同時保留私有的保留語料庫以進行受污染保護的評估。
2606.20255.author: Celestine Achi et.al.
